title: MuMuTestUp: Mutation-based Multi-Agent Test Case Update
authors: Dawei Tian, Jiakun Liu, Yun Peng, Yichen Zhang, Jianlei Chi, Jun Sun, Xiaohong Su
abstract: Modern software systems evolve rapidly under CI/CD practices, where tests are critical for quality. However, substantial code changes often render existing test cases obsolete, causing pipeline disruptions, reduced productivity, and compromised quality. Recent automatic test update approaches leverage LLMs to refine test cases via execution feedback and exact-matching context retrieval, prioritizing executability and line coverage but suffering three limitations: (1) neglecting test assertion adequacy, weakening fault detection; (2) relying on coarse line coverage instead of specific uncovered lines/branches; (3) using exact-matching retrieval, which fails for LLM hallucinated queries. To address these, we propose MuMuTestUp, a mutation-guided multi-agent framework with three specialized agents: Mutation Analysis (strengthens assertions via surviving mutants), Coverage Analysis (generates targeted repair instructions for uncovered lines/branches), and Semantic Retrieval (handles hallucinations via semantic-similarity search). We also construct PRBENCH, a 571-sample pull-request-level dataset from 10 open-source Java projects (validated for cross-commit update scenarios). Evaluations against state-of-the-art baselines use both open-source (Deepseek-V3.2) and closed-source (GPT-4.1) LLMs.
title_zh: MuMuTestUp：基于变异的多智能体测试用例更新
abstract_zh: 现代软件系统在CI/CD实践中快速演进，测试对质量至关重要。然而，大量代码变更常导致现有测试用例失效，引发流程中断、效率下降和质量受损。近期自动测试更新方法借助大型语言模型（LLM），通过执行反馈和精确匹配上下文检索优化测试用例，优先保证可执行性和行覆盖率，但存在三点局限：（1）忽视测试断言充分性，削弱缺陷检测能力；（2）依赖粗粒度的行覆盖率，而非具体的未覆盖行/分支；（3）采用精确匹配检索，无法应对LLM产生的幻觉查询。为此，我们提出MuMuTestUp——一种基于变体引导的多智能体框架，包含三个专用智能体：变体分析（通过存活变体强化断言）、覆盖率分析（为未覆盖行/分支生成针对性修复指令）和语义检索（通过语义相似度搜索处理幻觉）。我们还构建了PRBENCH数据集，包含来自10个开源Java项目（经验证的跨提交更新场景）的571个拉取请求级样本。评估采用开源（Deepseek-V3.2）和闭源（GPT-4.1）LLM，与最先进基线进行对比。

title: HSCO-Bench: An Agent-Driven End-to-End Hardware-Software Co-design Benchmark for Systems-on-Chip
authors: Pei-Huan Tsai, Kuan-Lin Chiu, William Baisi, Pin-Yu Chen, Luca P. Carloni
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are adopted for software and hardware design, yet these domains are still evaluated separately. Software benchmarks typically assume fixed hardware targets, while hardware benchmarks focus on component-level optimization without considering the full hardware-software stack. Consequently, no existing benchmark evaluates whether an LLM agent can perform end-to-end, system-level hardware-software co-design. Such a process requires: 1) analyzing applications to identify kernels requiring acceleration, 2) designing and integrating heterogeneous accelerators into a System-on-Chip (SoC) under resource constraints, and 3) mapping kernels onto the generated accelerators. We present HSCO-Bench, an end-to-end hardware-software co-design benchmark for accelerator-rich heterogeneous SoC generation. Built upon an open-source SoC platform with a curated repository structure, HSCO-Bench evaluates the ability of LLMs to jointly optimize software and hardware stacks, producing SoC prototypes deployed on the AMD Virtex-7 FPGA VC707 Evaluation Kit. Experimental results show that end-to-end integration remains challenging for current models. Among the five frontier models evaluated, only two of them could successfully generate valid SoC prototypes. Yet, even in these successful instances, the generated designs are far from optimal. While we observe a promising peak speedup of 16.22X, the maximum additional resource utilization reaches only 23.67%. This highlights that while state-of-the-art models demonstrate an emerging capability for hardware acceleration, they still heavily underutilize the available hardware capacity, leaving room for future optimization. To the best of our knowledge, HSCO-Bench is the first benchmark targeting this complete co-design flow, enabling LLMs to jointly reason about and modify both the software and hardware stacks of heterogeneous SoCs.
title_zh: HSCO-Bench：一种针对片上系统的代理驱动端到端软硬件协同设计基准
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）已被用于软件和硬件设计，但这些领域仍被分开评估。软件基准通常假设固定的硬件目标，而硬件基准则专注于组件级优化，未考虑完整的硬件-软件栈。因此，现有基准无法评估LLM代理是否能执行端到端、系统级的硬件-软件协同设计。这一过程需要：1）分析应用以识别需要加速的内核，2）在资源约束下设计并将异构加速器集成到片上系统（SoC）中，3）将内核映射到生成的加速器上。我们提出了HSCO-Bench，这是一个针对加速器丰富的异构SoC生成的端到端硬件-软件协同设计基准。HSCO-Bench基于开源SoC平台和精心整理的代码库结构，评估LLM在联合优化软件和硬件栈方面的能力，生成可在AMD Virtex-7 FPGA VC707评估套件上部署的SoC原型。实验结果表明，端到端集成对当前模型仍具挑战性。在评估的五种前沿模型中，仅有两种能成功生成有效的SoC原型。然而，即使在这些成功案例中，生成的设计也远非最优。尽管我们观察到16.22倍的峰值加速比，但最大额外资源利用率仅达到23.67%。这表明，虽然最先进的模型展现出硬件加速的新兴能力，但它们仍严重未充分利用可用的硬件容量，为未来优化留下了空间。据我们所知，HSCO-Bench是首个针对这一完整协同设计流程的基准，使LLM能够联合推理并修改异构SoC的软件和硬件栈。

title: On-the-Fly Input Adaptation for Reliable Code Intelligence
authors: Ravishka Rathnasuriya, Wei Yang
abstract: Code language models (CLMs) play a central role in software engineering across both generation and classification tasks. However, these models still exhibit notable mispredictions in real-world applications, even when trained on up-to-date data. Existing solutions address this by retraining the model, modifying its architecture, or re-engineering prompts. These approaches incur high computational cost requiring substantial effort in data labeling, model updates, and redeployment, and often suffer from poor generalization across tasks and tuning instability across models. This work proposes an alternative strategy based on on-the-fly input adaptation, which improves model behavior without altering its parameters or requiring additional supervision. The method consists of two stages: input validation, which detects inputs likely to cause mispredictions, and input adaptation, which transforms them using syntax- and semantics-preserving operations to better align with the model's learned behavior. This dual strategy reduces mispredictions across diverse code understanding tasks, boosting model performance without necessitating retraining. As a scalable and resource-efficient solution, this framework holds significant promise for high-stakes applications in software engineering where reliability is critical.
title_zh: 面向可靠代码智能的即时输入适应
abstract_zh: 代码语言模型（CLMs）在软件工程中扮演着核心角色，广泛应用于生成和分类任务。然而，即使使用最新数据训练，这些模型在实际应用中仍会出现显著的预测错误。现有解决方案通过重新训练模型、修改其架构或重新设计提示词来应对这些问题。这些方法计算成本高昂，需要大量数据标注、模型更新和重新部署工作，并且往往存在跨任务泛化性差以及跨模型调优不稳定的问题。本研究提出了一种基于实时输入适应的替代策略，该方法在不改变模型参数或需要额外监督的情况下改进模型行为。该策略包含两个阶段：输入验证（检测可能导致预测错误的输入）和输入适应（通过保留语法和语义的操作转换输入，使其更好地与模型已学习的行为对齐）。这种双重策略减少了跨多种代码理解任务的预测错误，从而无需重新训练即可提升模型性能。作为一种可扩展且资源高效的解决方案，该框架在软件工程中对可靠性要求极高的关键应用中具有重要前景。

title: Measuring Safety Alignment Effects in Autonomous Security Agents
authors: Isaac David, Arthur Gervais
abstract: Do stock safety-aligned language models and their uncensored or abliterated derivatives behave differently when run as autonomous security agents? Single-turn refusal benchmarks cannot answer this question: security agents must inspect repositories, call tools, and produce vulnerability evidence inside authorized sandboxes. We present a trace-based benchmark of 30 local vulnerability-analysis tasks with fixed tools, deterministic success predicates, redaction rules, and grounding checks, and compare four stock models against uncensored or abliterated derivatives: Gemma 4 31B, Gemma 4 26B A4B, Qwen2.5-Coder 7B, and Llama 3.1 8B. The artifact contains 1,500 security-agent traces and 800 non-security control traces. The Gemma pairs show large less-restricted gains on security tasks: 14.0% versus 0.7% success for 31B and 10.7% versus 0.0% for 26B, with higher mean grounding (3.91 versus 3.27 and 4.12 versus 1.64 out of five) and 0.0% refusal, suppressed-action, and unsafe-action rates in the 31B traces. However, controls and non-Gemma pairs rule out a clean security-specific or universal less-restricted effect: Gemma gaps also appear on ordinary coding tasks, Qwen2.5-Coder success is lower for the less-restricted derivative (2.0% versus 5.3%), and the abliterated Llama derivative fails the tool protocol. Across all families, hard proof-of-trigger and patch-verification tasks remain unsolved. These results show that safety alignment effects in autonomous security agents should be measured at the system level, separating refusal, unsafe action, tool reliability, and evidence grounding rather than treating refusal rate as the safety signal.
title_zh: 自主安全代理中的安全对齐效果测量
abstract_zh: 经过安全对齐的原始语言模型与其未经审查或消融的衍生版本在作为自主安全代理运行时，行为是否存在差异？单轮拒绝基准无法回答这个问题：安全代理必须检查代码仓库、调用工具，并在授权的沙箱内生成漏洞证据。我们提出了一个基于轨迹的基准测试，包含30个本地漏洞分析任务，具有固定工具、确定性成功判定条件、编辑规则和基础检查，并比较了四个原始模型与其未经审查或消融的衍生版本：Gemma 4 31B、Gemma 4 26B A4B、Qwen2.5-Coder 7B 和 Llama 3.1 8B。该工件包含1,500个安全代理轨迹和800个非安全控制轨迹。Gemma配对在安全任务上展现出较大的限制较少增益：31B的成功率为14.0%对比0.7%，26B为10.7%对比0.0%，并且平均基础评分更高（31B为3.91对比3.27，26B为4.12对比1.64，满分5分），在31B的轨迹中，拒绝率、抑制动作率和不安全动作率均为0.0%。然而，控制组和非Gemma配对排除了纯粹的安全特定或通用限制较少效应：Gemma的差距也出现在普通编码任务中，Qwen2.5-Coder限制较少的衍生版本成功率更低（2.0%对比5.3%），而消融的Llama衍生版本未能通过工具协议。在所有模型家族中，硬性的触发证据证明和补丁验证任务仍未解决。这些结果表明，在自主安全代理中，安全对齐的影响应在系统层面进行测量，将拒绝、不安全行为、工具可靠性和证据基础分开考虑，而非将拒绝率视为唯一的安全信号。

title: Completeness of Synthesis under Realizability Assumptions using Superposition
authors: Márton Hajdu, Petra Hozzová, Laura Kovács, Eva Maria Wagner
abstract: Program synthesis is the task of automatically deriving a program that has been specified by a user in advance. Combining automated theorem proving with program synthesis enables the automated construction of proven-to-be-correct programs, thereby ensuring software reliability. In this paper, we consider the superposition-based calculus extended to support synthesis of recursion-free programs allowing reasoning with uncomputable symbols. We present cases where the calculus fails and refine it to solve them. We prove that the refined calculus is sound. Finally, we also prove completeness in the following sense: if at least one computable program satisfying the given specification exists, we show that the modified calculus finds one.
title_zh: 使用叠加法在可实现性假设下的合成完备性
abstract_zh: 程序合成是指自动推导出用户事先指定的程序的任务。将自动定理证明与程序合成相结合，可以自动构建经过验证的正确程序，从而确保软件的可靠性。在本文中，我们考虑将基于叠加的演算扩展以支持无递归程序的合成，从而允许对不可计算符号进行推理。我们展示了该演算失败的情况，并对其进行改进以解决这些问题。我们证明了改进后的演算是可靠的。最后，我们还证明了如下意义下的完备性：如果存在至少一个可计算程序满足给定的规范，则改进后的演算能够找到这样一个程序。

title: Characterizing Real-World Bugs in Tile Programs for Automated Bug Detection
authors: Ravishka Rathnasuriya, Zihe Song, Nidhi Majoju, Aaryaa Moharir, Tingxi Li, Wei Yang, Tao Xie
abstract: Tile-based programming frameworks are increasingly adopted to write high-performance GPU kernels in domains such as deep learning and scientific computing. While these frameworks enhance productivity and hardware utilization, their multi-stage compilation pipelines introduce distinct code generation bugs that are tightly coupled to input shapes, data types, and backend targets. These bugs often manifest as silent correctness or performance issues, making them difficult to detect using existing compiler testing tools. Additionally, the unique programming conventions of tile domain-specific languages complicate root cause identification, while fixing such bugs demands specialized knowledge of tile abstractions and compilation pipelines. Despite the growing adoption of tile-based systems, their code generation bugs remain largely unexplored. This paper presents the first systematic study of tile-program code generation bugs. We curate 401 bug reports from GitHub and identify 301 tile-program codegen bugs for analysis, categorizing the root causes, symptoms, input patterns, test oracles that trigger these bugs, and the strategies used to fix bugs. Our study provides foundational insights for building debugging, testing, and repair tools tailored to tile-based compiler infrastructures.
title_zh: 用于自动缺陷检测的平铺程序中的真实缺陷特征刻画
abstract_zh: 基于图块的编程框架越来越多地被用于编写高性能GPU内核，涉及深度学习与科学计算等领域。虽然这些框架提高了生产效率和硬件利用率，但其多级编译流水线引入了特定的代码生成错误，这些错误与输入形状、数据类型和后端目标紧密耦合。此类错误常表现为静默正确性问题或性能问题，导致现有编译器测试工具难以检测。此外，图块领域特定语言独特的编程规范增加了根因识别的难度，而修复此类错误需要图块抽象和编译流水线方面的专业知识。尽管基于图块的系统应用日益广泛，其代码生成错误仍鲜有系统研究。本文首次对图块编程的代码生成错误进行了系统性研究。我们从GitHub收集了401个错误报告，筛选出301个图块编程代码生成错误进行分析，分类梳理了根因、症状、输入模式、触发错误的测试预言，以及修复策略。本研究为构建针对基于图块的编译器基础设施的调试、测试与修复工具提供了基础性见解。

title: Text-to-SPARQL Generation with Reinforcement Learning: A GRPO-based Approach on DBLP
authors: Jann Pfeifer, Debayan Banerjee, Ricardo Usbeck
abstract: Knowledge graph question answering seeks to translate natural language questions into executable queries over knowledge graphs, but existing approaches often rely on large models or full supervision in the form of gold query annotations. This study examines whether reinforcement learning with outcome-based rewards can train a small instruction-tuned language model to perform zero-shot Text-to-SPARQL generation in the scholarly domain. Group-Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is applied to the Qwen3-1.7B model on DBLP-QuAD, using prompts that combine natural language questions with symbolic hints about entities and relations. Training relies on execution feedback, structural constraints, and answer-level rewards, with an additional variant that incorporates gold-query-based shaping. The resulting models are compared to the unmodified zero-shot baseline and to a supervised DoRA-finetuned baseline across answer-level accuracy, execution accuracy, category-wise scores, and generalization to held-out templates. GRPO substantially improves over the zero-shot baseline and exhibits competitive generalization, while supervised DoRA finetuning achieves higher overall accuracy on the same model scale. Ablation analyses indicate that execution-based rewards account for most gains, with additional shaping yielding limited additional benefit, suggesting that outcome-based reinforcement learning is a viable training strategy when gold queries are unavailable for token-level supervision.
title_zh: 基于强化学习的文本到SPARQL生成：在DBLP上基于GRPO的方法
abstract_zh: 知识图谱问答旨在将自然语言问题转化为可执行的知识图谱查询，但现有方法通常依赖大型模型或标注了标准查询形式的完全监督。本研究探讨了基于结果奖励的强化学习能否训练一个小型指令微调语言模型，在学术领域实现零样本的Text-to-SPARQL生成。我们将群体相对策略优化（GRPO）应用于基于DBLP-QuAD的Qwen3-1.7B模型，使用的提示将自然语言问题与实体和关系的符号提示相结合。训练依赖于执行反馈、结构约束和答案级奖励，并引入了一个结合标准查询形状（gold-query-based shaping）的变体。将所得模型与未经修改的零样本基线以及经过监督式DoRA微调的基线进行比较，评估指标包括答案级准确率、执行准确率、类别得分以及对保留模板的泛化能力。GRPO显著优于零样本基线，并展现出具有竞争力的泛化性能，而在相同模型规模下，监督式DoRA微调实现了更高的总体准确率。消融分析表明，基于执行的奖励贡献了大部分性能提升，而额外的形状奖励带来的改进有限，这表明当标准查询无法提供令牌级监督时，基于结果的强化学习是一种可行的训练策略。

title: Can LLMs Produce Better Object-Oriented Designs than Human-Involved Development?
authors: Zushuai Zhang, Elliott Wen, Ewan Tempero
abstract: Background: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for code generation. However, their ability to generate multi-class projects that require object-oriented design (OOD) remains unclear, especially relative to projects developed with human involvement. Aims: The primary objective of this study is to compare OOD quality in projects from three authorship conditions: PreAI (human-involved projects produced before widespread LLM use), PostAI (human-involved projects produced after widespread LLM use), and PureAI (projects generated end-to-end by contemporary LLMs). Method: We conducted a comparative case study on a postgraduate Java assignment. Two offerings of the same assignment were selected as the PreAI and PostAI datasets. PureAI projects were generated using three contemporary LLMs. We analyzed OOD quality using project-level OOD metrics, code smell density, and domain modeling. Results: Relative to human-involved projects, PureAI projects show lower code smell density and generally appear simpler in terms of total size, complexity, and coupling. However, this is consistent with oversimplification, as it is associated with missing abstractions and weaker responsibility separation. PostAI is closer to PureAI than PreAI on many OOD measures and also shows tendencies toward oversimplification. Conclusions: Our findings indicate that appropriate human guidance on object-oriented decomposition and responsibility assignment remains important when LLMs are used for object-oriented design.
title_zh: LLMs能否生成比人类参与开发更好的面向对象设计？
abstract_zh: 背景：大型语言模型（LLMs）正越来越多地被用于代码生成。然而，它们生成需要面向对象设计（OOD）的多类项目的能力仍不明确，尤其是与有人类参与开发的项目相比。目标：本研究的主要目标是比较三种作者条件下的项目中的OOD质量：PreAI（广泛使用LLM之前由人类参与的项目）、PostAI（广泛使用LLM之后由人类参与的项目）和PureAI（由当代LLM端到端生成的项目）。方法：我们对一项研究生Java作业进行了比较案例研究。选择该作业的两次授课作为PreAI和PostAI数据集。PureAI项目使用三种当代LLM生成。我们使用项目级OOD指标、代码坏味密度和领域建模来分析OOD质量。结果：与人类参与的项目相比，PureAI项目显示出更低的代码坏味密度，并且在总体规模、复杂度和耦合度方面通常更简单。然而，这与过度简化一致，因为这与缺少抽象和较弱的职责分离相关。在许多OOD指标上，PostAI比PreAI更接近PureAI，并且也表现出过度简化的趋势。结论：我们的研究结果表明，在使用LLM进行面向对象设计时，对面向对象分解和职责分配的适当人类指导仍然重要。

title: Mega-ASR: Towards In-the-wild^2 Speech Recognition via Scaling up Real-world Acoustic Simulation
authors: Zhifei Xie, Kaiyu Pang, Haobin Zhang, Deheng Ye, Xiaobin Hu, Shuicheng Yan, Chunyan Miao
abstract: Despite rapid advances in automatic speech recognition (ASR) and large audio-language models, robust recognition in real-world environments remains limited by an "acoustic robustness bottleneck": models often lose acoustic grounding and produce omissions or hallucinations under severe, compositional distortions. We propose Mega-ASR, a unified ASR-in-the-wild framework that combines scalable compound-data construction with progressive acoustic-to-semantic optimization. We introduce Voices-in-the-Wild-2M, covering 7 classic acoustic phenomena and 54 physically plausible compound scenarios, and train Mega-ASR with Acoustic-to-Semantic Progressive Supervised Fine-Tuning and Dual-Granularity WER-Gated Policy Optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Mega-ASR achieves significant advantages over prior state-of-the-art systems on adverse-condition ASR benchmarks (45.69% vs. 54.01% on VOiCES R4-B-F, and 21.49% vs. 29.34% on NOIZEUS Sta-0). On complex compositional acoustic scenarios, Mega-ASR further delivers over 30% relative WER reduction against strong open- and closed-source baselines, establishing a scalable paradigm for robust ASR in-the-wild.
title_zh: Mega-ASR：通过扩展真实世界声学模拟实现野外²环境语音识别
abstract_zh: 尽管自动语音识别（ASR）和大规模音频-语言模型取得了快速进展，但在真实环境中的鲁棒识别仍受限于“声学鲁棒性瓶颈”：模型在严重且组合性的失真条件下，常会丢失声学基础，产生漏读或幻觉现象。我们提出Mega-ASR，这是一种统一的野外ASR框架，结合了可扩展的复合数据构建与渐进式声学到语义优化。我们引入Voices-in-the-Wild-2M数据集，覆盖7种经典声学现象和54种物理可行的复合场景，并通过声学到语义渐进式监督微调与双粒度WER门控策略优化来训练Mega-ASR。大量实验表明，在恶劣条件ASR基准测试上，Mega-ASR相比先前最先进系统取得了显著优势（VOiCES R4-B-F上45.69%对比54.01%，NOIZEUS Sta-0上21.49%对比29.34%）。在复杂复合声学场景中，Mega-ASR相较于强大的开源和闭源基线进一步实现了超过30%的相对词错误率降低，为野外鲁棒ASR建立了一个可扩展的范式。

title: Aerial Inspection Behaviors via RL-based Quadrotor Control for Under-canopy Forest Environments
authors: Fausto Mauricio Lagos Suarez, Akshit Saradagi, Vidya Sumathy, Viswa Narayanan Sankaranarayanan, George Nikolakopoulos
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of using a deep Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based low-level Quadrotor controller within an autonomous Quadrotor navigation stack for aerial inspection missions in under-canopy forest environments. Specifically, the article presents an end-to-end (mapping states to RPMs) Quadrotor control policy that achieves inspection view-pose tracking (simultaneous position and yaw reference tracking), which is crucial for various target inspection behaviors and point-to-point navigation in forests. To ensure safe and reliable deployment of the end-to-end RL controller in long-range missions, this article utilizes a higher navigation guidance layer comprising of a Traveling Salesman Problem planner (TSP) and a Rapidly-exploring Random Tree Star (RRT*) planner. Over a known map of a forest and a set of user-specified inspection regions, the TSP planner finds the optimal visitation sequence. Between two target regions, collision-free paths that respect the tracking limitations of the lower end-to-end RL policy are generated by an RRT* planner. Through five target inspection scenarios, this article demonstrates that an RL-based motor-level stabilizing controller, supported by a navigation guidance layer, can be used effectively as the low-level inspection execution module for under-canopy forest inspection missions.
title_zh: 基于强化学习的四旋翼控制在林冠下森林环境中的空中巡检行为
abstract_zh: 本文针对在冠层下森林环境中执行空中巡检任务时，将基于深度强化学习（RL）的低层级四旋翼控制器集成到自主四旋翼导航系统中的应用问题展开研究。具体而言，本文提出了一种端到端（将状态映射到电机转速）的四旋翼控制策略，该策略能够实现巡检视图位姿跟踪（同步位置与偏航角参考跟踪），这对森林环境中的各类目标巡检行为及点对点导航至关重要。为确保端到端强化学习控制器在长距离任务中的安全可靠部署，本文采用由旅行商问题规划器（TSP）和快速扩展随机树*规划器（RRT*）组成的高层级导航引导层。基于已知的森林地图和用户指定的巡检区域，TSP规划器计算出最优访问序列；而在两个目标区域之间，RRT*规划器会生成满足底层端到端强化学习策略跟踪限制的无碰撞路径。通过五个目标巡检场景的验证，本文证明：在导航引导层的支撑下，基于强化学习的电机级稳定控制器能够有效作为冠层下森林巡检任务中的底层巡检执行模块。

title: Prior Knowledge or Search? A Study of LLM Agents in Hardware-Aware Code Optimization
authors: Dmitry Redko, Albert Fazlyev, Konstantin Sozykin, Maria Ivanova, Evgeny Burnaev, Egor Shvetsov
abstract: LLM discovery and optimization systems are increasingly applied across domains, implementing a common propose-evaluate-revise loop. Such optimization or discovery progresses via context conditioning on received feedback from an environment. However, as modern LLM agents are increasingly complex in their structure, it is difficult to evaluate which components contribute the most, and when and how this exploration may fail. We answer these questions through three controlled experiments. Our findings: (1) In pure black-box optimization, LLMs act as greedy optimizers. (2) In zero-shot kernel generation, providing explicit input-size information has no measurable effect, models converge to the same kernel parameters regardless of size or temperature, as though the size instruction were invisible. Moreover, when tasked to perform kernel optimization for uncommon kernel sizes, performance sharply degrades regardless of the language used. (3) In feedback-loop kernel optimization, CUDA improves monotonically under iterative feedback, while TVM IR actively degrades, which demonstrates that kernel optimization degrades when models operate with low-density language. Our results conclude that LLMs in code optimization tasks highly depend on pretrained priors rather than provided feedback or agentic structure.
title_zh: 先验知识还是搜索？面向硬件感知代码优化的LLM智能体研究
abstract_zh: LLM发现与优化系统正越来越多地跨领域应用，并遵循着通用的“提出-评估-修正”循环。这类优化或发现过程通过依据从环境中接收到的反馈进行上下文条件调整来实现进展。然而，随着现代LLM智能体在结构上日益复杂，评估哪些组件贡献最大、以及这种探索可能在何时、以何种方式失败变得困难。我们通过三个控制实验来解答这些问题。研究发现：（1）在纯黑盒优化中，LLM表现为贪婪优化器。（2）在零样本核生成中，提供明确的输入规模信息并无显著效果，无论规模或温度如何，模型都收敛于相同的核参数，仿佛规模指令不可见。此外，当要求针对非标准核尺寸执行核优化时，无论使用何种语言，性能都会急剧下降。（3）在反馈回路核优化中，CUDA在迭代反馈下呈现单调提升，而TVM IR则主动退化，这表明当模型使用低密度语言时，核优化效果会下降。我们的结论是：在代码优化任务中，LLM高度依赖预训练先验，而非所提供的反馈或智能体结构。

title: SCARA: A Semantics-Constrained Autonomous Remediation Agent for Opaque Industrial Software Vulnerabilities
authors: Bowei Ning, Xuejun Zong, Lian Lian, Kan He, Guogang Wang, Yifei Sun, Jinyang Liu
abstract: Critical-infrastructure operators are increasingly expected to assess and remediate vulnerabilities in deployed industrial software. However, much of this software exists as opaque industrial software (OIS), including stripped firmware, proprietary protocol handlers, and compiled control logic without source code, symbols, build environments, or hardware interfaces. While binary analysis can identify vulnerability candidates, existing automated repair systems largely rely on source code, compilable artifacts, sanitizer feedback, or instrumentable builds, leaving a gap between binary-level discovery and validated remediation. This paper presents SCARA, a Semantics-Constrained Autonomous Remediation Agent for OIS. SCARA operates under a source-unavailable defender model and connects upstream binary vulnerability candidates to conditionally validated remedies through a four-stage pipeline. Operational-state-aware verification (OSVA) filters infeasible candidates using a nine-component industrial state model; remediation synthesis (RSA) selects the strongest available remedy across protocol mitigation, binary hardening, and SSCKG-constrained source patches; and correctness validation (CVA) provides conditional correctness evidence via behavioral-coverage preservation, independent replay, and typed rejection feedback. On OIS-RemedBench, a 15-case benchmark spanning firmware, protocol handlers, and ICS/PLC artifacts, SCARA achieves observed 100% precision with no false positives, refutes 20.0% of cases as operationally infeasible, and reaches 88.9% remediation success after targeted reruns. To our knowledge, SCARA is the first end-to-end framework that connects binary vulnerability candidates to conditionally validated remediation for opaque industrial software.
title_zh: SCARA：一种语义受限的自主修复代理，用于不透明工业软件漏洞
abstract_zh: 关键基础设施运营商正日益被要求评估和修复已部署工业软件中的漏洞。然而，其中大部分软件是“不透明工业软件”（OIS），包括剥离固件、专有协议处理器以及无源代码、符号、构建环境或硬件接口的编译控制逻辑。尽管二进制分析能够识别潜在的漏洞候选，但现有的自动化修复系统大多依赖于源代码、可编译制品、消毒反馈或可插桩构建，从而在二进制层面的发现与已验证的补救之间留下了空白。本文提出SCARA——一种面向OIS的语义约束自主修复代理。SCARA在无源代码的防御者模型下运行，通过一个四阶段流水线，将上游二进制漏洞候选与有条件验证的补救措施相连接。操作状态感知验证（OSVA）使用九组件工业状态模型过滤不可行的候选；修复合成（RSA）在协议缓解、二进制加固和SSCKG约束的源代码补丁中选择最强可用的补救措施；正确性验证（CVA）通过行为覆盖保持、独立重放和类型化拒绝反馈提供条件性正确性证据。在OIS-RemedBench（一个包含15个案例的基准，涵盖固件、协议处理器和ICS/PLC工件）上，SCARA实现了观察到的100%精确率（无假阳性），拒绝了20.0%的案例（因操作不可行），在有针对性的重新运行后修复成功率达到88.9%。据我们所知，SCARA是首个将二进制漏洞候选与针对不透明工业软件的有条件验证补救措施相连接的端到端框架。

title: CriterAlign: Criterion-Centric Rationale Alignment for Code Preference Judging
authors: Zhenyu Li, Aleksandar Cvejic, Zehui Chen, Peter Wonka
abstract: Pairwise human preference prediction is central to evaluating code-generation systems, where quality often depends on task-specific trade-offs beyond functional correctness. While rubric-based LLM judges improve interpretability by decomposing evaluation into explicit criteria, most existing pipelines remain pointwise: they score each response independently and derive preferences by comparing aggregated scores. We show that this design is poorly matched to pairwise code preference prediction and can underperform a strong monolithic judge. We propose CriterAlign, a criterion-centric framework that adapts rubric-based judging to pairwise preference evaluation through direct criterion-level pairwise judgments, tie-driven criterion refinement, swap-consistency filtering, and final pairwise synthesis. We further introduce Human-Preference-Aligned Guidance (HPAG), synthesized offline from training examples by extracting recurring rationale gaps between human preferences and monolithic judge predictions, and injected into the criterion generator, criterion judge, and final judge. On BigCodeReward, CriterAlign improves a Qwen2.5-VL-32B monolithic judge from 60.4% to 66.3% accuracy, with ablations confirming the contributions of pairwise criterion design and HPAG.
title_zh: CriterAlign：面向准则的推理对齐方法用于代码偏好评判
abstract_zh: 成对人类偏好预测是评估代码生成系统的核心任务，其质量往往取决于功能正确性之外、针对特定任务的权衡。虽然基于评分标准的LLM评判器通过将评估分解为显式标准提升了可解释性，但现有流程大多仍是逐点评判：它们独立对每个响应进行评分，并通过比较聚合分数得出偏好。我们证明，这种设计难以匹配成对代码偏好预测，其表现可能不及强大的单一评判器。为此，我们提出CriterAlign——一种以标准为中心的框架，通过直接进行成对标准级评判、平局驱动的标准优化、交换一致性过滤以及最终成对合成，将基于评分标准的评判适配到成对偏好评估。此外，我们还引入了人类偏好对齐指导（HPAG），通过从训练样本中提取人类偏好与单一评判器预测之间的反复出现的逻辑差距，离线合成这一指导，并将其注入到标准生成器、标准评判器和最终评判器中。在BigCodeReward数据集上，CriterAlign将Qwen2.5-VL-32B单一评判器的准确率从60.4%提升至66.3%，消融实验证实了成对标准设计和HPAG的贡献。

title: optimize_anything: A Universal API for Optimizing any Text Parameter
authors: Lakshya A Agrawal, Donghyun Lee, Shangyin Tan, Wenjie Ma, Karim Elmaaroufi, Rohit Sandadi, Sanjit A. Seshia, Koushik Sen, Dan Klein, Ion Stoica, Joseph E. Gonzalez, Omar Khattab, Alexandros G. Dimakis, Matei Zaharia
abstract: Can a single LLM-based optimization system match specialized tools across fundamentally different domains? We show that when optimization problems are formulated as improving a text artifact evaluated by a scoring function, a single AI-based optimization system-supporting single-task search, multi-task search with cross-problem transfer, and generalization to unseen inputs-achieves state-of-the-art results across six diverse tasks. Our system discovers agent architectures that nearly triple Gemini Flash's ARC-AGI accuracy (32.5% to 89.5%), finds scheduling algorithms that cut cloud costs by 40%, generates CUDA kernels where 87% match or beat PyTorch, and outperforms AlphaEvolve's reported circle packing solution (n=26). Ablations across three domains reveal that actionable side information yields faster convergence and substantially higher final scores than score-only feedback, and that multi-task search outperforms independent optimization given equivalent per-problem budget through cross-task transfer, with benefits scaling with the number of related tasks. Together, we show for the first time that text optimization with LLM-based search is a general-purpose problem-solving paradigm, unifying tasks traditionally requiring domain-specific algorithms under a single framework. We open-source optimize\_anything with support for multiple backends as part of the GEPA project at https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa .
title_zh: 优化一切：用于优化任何文本参数的通用API
abstract_zh: 一个基于单一LLM的优化系统能否在本质上不同的领域中匹配专门工具的性能？我们证明，当优化问题被表述为改进由评分函数评估的文本工件时，一个统一的AI优化系统——支持单任务搜索、跨问题迁移的多任务搜索以及对未见输入进行泛化——在六项不同任务上均取得了最先进的结果。我们的系统发现了能将Gemini Flash的ARC-AGI准确率从32.5%提升至89.5%的智能体架构，找到了能将云成本削减40%的调度算法，生成了87%匹配或超越PyTorch的CUDA内核，并在AlphaEvolve报告的圆形填充方案（n=26）上表现更优。跨三个领域的消融实验表明，与仅提供分数反馈相比，可操作的侧信息能带来更快的收敛速度和显著更高的最终分数；在同等每问题预算下，多任务搜索通过跨任务迁移优于独立优化，且收益随相关任务数量的增加而扩大。综上所述，我们首次证明，基于LLM搜索的文本优化是一种通用问题求解范式，将传统上需要领域特定算法的任务统一纳入单一框架。我们已在GEPA项目的https://github.com/gepa-ai/gepa上开源了支持多个后端的optimize_anything。

title: Hunting Vulnerability Variants in AI Infra: Measurement and Reference-Driven Detection
authors: Tian Dong, Yanjun Chen, Shoufeng Zhang, Huaien Zhang, Yunlong Lyu, Keke Lian, Dong Zhang, Shaofeng Li, Hao Chen
abstract: AI infra has become a shared execution layer for model training, deployment, and agent orchestration. Because many projects reimplement similar model-centric workflows, a vulnerability disclosed in one repository can recur as a variant in another repository with a related design. Yet the prevalence and detectability of these variants remain poorly understood. This paper presents a measurement study of vulnerability variants in AI infra. Analyzing 688 GitHub repositories and 251 publicly disclosed vulnerabilities, we find that AI infra projects frequently share overlapping functionality and recurrent vulnerable patterns, creating a concrete basis for cross-repository variants. Building on this finding, we study how to automatically identify such variants from known disclosures. We propose INFRASCOPE, a reference-driven multi-agent framework that extracts transferable vulnerability semantics from known cases and uses them to locate and validate variants in new repositories. Evaluating INFRASCOPE on 20 real-world AI infra repositories, we uncover over 20 vulnerabilities, including 11 acknowledged cases and 4 cases that have been assigned CVEs so far.
title_zh: AI基础设施中的漏洞变种挖掘：测量与参考驱动的检测
abstract_zh: AI基础设施已成为模型训练、部署和智能体编排的共享执行层。由于许多项目重新实现了类似的以模型为中心的工作流程，一个仓库中披露的漏洞可能会以变体的形式出现在另一个具有相关设计的仓库中。然而，这些变体的普遍性和可检测性仍不明确。本文对AI基础设施中的漏洞变体进行了测量研究。通过分析688个GitHub仓库和251个公开披露的漏洞，我们发现AI基础设施项目经常共享重叠功能以及反复出现的易受攻击模式，这为跨仓库的漏洞变体提供了具体基础。基于这一发现，我们研究了如何从已知披露中自动识别此类变体。我们提出了INFRASCOPE，一个参考驱动的多智能体框架，它从已知案例中提取可迁移的漏洞语义，并利用这些语义在新仓库中定位和验证变体。在20个真实的AI基础设施仓库上评估INFRASCOPE，我们发现了超过20个漏洞，其中包括11个已确认的案例，以及截至目前已有4个案例被分配了CVE编号。

title: Less Back-and-Forth: A Comparative Study of Structured Prompting
authors: Saurav Ghosh, Gabriella Polach, Abdou Sow
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used for open-ended tasks, but underspecified prompts can lead to low-quality answers and additional interaction. This paper studies whether structured prompt design improves response quality while reducing user effort. We compare three prompt conditions: a raw prompt, a checklist-improved prompt, and a clarifying-question prompt. We evaluate these conditions across four task types--summarization, planning, explanation, and coding--using three LLM systems: ChatGPT, Claude, and Grok. Each output is scored with a unified rubric covering task completion, correctness, compliance, and clarity. Checklist-improved prompts achieved the highest mean rubric score, 7.50 out of 8, compared with 5.67 for raw prompts and 6.67 for clarifying-question prompts. Checklist prompts also produced the best quality-effort tradeoff, using fewer average tokens than both raw and clarifying prompts. These results suggest that a simple prompt checklist can improve LLM responses while reducing unnecessary interaction.
title_zh: 减少来回：结构化提示的比较研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）广泛应用于开放式任务，但未充分指定的提示可能导致低质量回答并需要额外的交互。本文研究结构化提示设计能否在减少用户努力的同时提升回答质量。我们比较了三种提示条件：原始提示、清单改进提示和澄清问题提示。我们使用三种LLM系统——ChatGPT、Claude和Grok——在四种任务类型（摘要、规划、解释和编码）上评估这些条件。每个输出使用统一的评分标准进行评分，涵盖任务完成度、正确性、合规性和清晰度。清单改进提示的平均评分最高，为8分中的7.50分，而原始提示为5.67分，澄清问题提示为6.67分。清单提示还实现了最佳的质量-努力权衡，使用的平均令牌数少于原始提示和澄清提示。这些结果表明，简单的提示清单可以改善LLM的回答，同时减少不必要的交互。

title: DRReduce: Enhancing Syntax-Guided Program Reduction with Dependency Reconstruction
authors: Qiong Feng, Xiaotian Ma, Yongqiang Tian, Wei Song, Peng Liang
abstract: Program reduction is a technique for simplifying large, failure-inducing programs into minimal reproducible test cases. Language-specific tools such as CReduce achieve strong performance by leveraging deep semantic knowledge of C/C++, but are tightly coupled to a single language family. Language-agnostic reducers such as Perses address this by applying syntax-guided search across any grammar, yet share a fundamental limitation: deleting a node or subtree in isolation often breaks semantic coherence causing the property checker to reject the deletion and forcing the reducer to backtrack, limiting overall reduction effectiveness and efficiency. In this paper, we propose DRReduce, a framework that bridges this gap by augmenting language-agnostic syntactic reduction with a lightweight semantic layer: dependency reconstruction, which repairs program dependencies broken by a deletion in order to preserve the semantic validity of intermediate programs and increase the acceptance rate of the property checker. DRReduce constructs a semantic dependency graph from the input program, performs semantically coherent deletions with dependency reconstruction, and delegates further minimization to a syntax-guided reducer. We implement DRReduce for C and Java and evaluate it on real-world bug-triggering programs. Compared to SOTA syntax-guided reducers, DRReduce achieves average size reductions of 51.9%, 14.9%, and 19.8% over Perses, WDD, and CDD respectively, while completing reduction faster on the majority of programs. Compared to language-specific tools, DRReduce achieves results comparable to CReduce and Latra without any language-specific transformation rules, at 3.3x and 1.2x higher efficiency than CReduce and Latra on average, respectively. An ablation study confirms that dependency reconstruction reduces query invocations by 80.2%, reduction time by 58.7%, and final token count by over 55.1%.
title_zh: DRReduce：通过依赖重构增强语法指导的程序简化
abstract_zh: 程序缩减是一种将大型的、会诱发失败的程序简化为最小可复现测试用例的技术。诸如CReduce等语言特定工具通过深入利用C/C++的语义知识取得了优秀性能，但仅能紧密耦合于单一语言家族。而Perses等语言无关的缩减工具通过在所有文法上应用语法引导搜索解决了这一问题，但它们存在一个根本性局限：独立删除某个节点或子树往往会破坏语义一致性，导致属性检查器拒绝该删除操作，迫使缩减器回溯，从而限制了整体缩减效果与效率。本文提出DRReduce框架，它通过在语言无关的语法缩减之上增加轻量级语义层——依赖重构，来弥合这一差距。该依赖重构机制能修复因删除操作而破坏的程序依赖关系，从而保持中间程序的语义有效性，提升属性检查器的接受率。DRReduce从输入程序构建语义依赖图，执行带依赖重构的语义一致删除，并将进一步的最小化工作委托给语法引导缩减器。我们针对C和Java实现了DRReduce，并在真实的错误触发程序上进行了评估。与当前最先进的语法引导缩减器相比，DRReduce相较于Perses、WDD和CDD分别实现了平均51.9%、14.9%和19.8%的规模缩减，同时在大多数程序上完成缩减的速度更快。与语言特定工具相比，DRReduce无需任何语言特定的转换规则即可达到与CReduce和Latra相当的结果，平均效率分别是CReduce和Latra的3.3倍和1.2倍。消融研究证实，依赖重构将查询调用次数降低了80.2%，缩减时间减少了58.7%，最终令牌数量减少了超过55.1%。

title: SceneCode: Executable World Programs for Editable Indoor Scenes with Articulated Objects
authors: Puyi Wang, Yuhao Wang, Linjie Li, Zhengyuan Yang, Kevin Qinghong Lin, Yangguang Li, Yu Cheng
abstract: Indoor scene synthesis underpins embodied AI, robotic manipulation, and simulation-based policy evaluation, where a useful scene must specify not only what the environment looks like, but also how its objects are structured. Existing pipelines, however, typically represent generated content as static meshes and inherit articulation only from curated asset libraries, which limits object-level controllability and prevents new interactable assets from being produced on demand. We address this gap by formulating physically interactable indoor scene synthesis as programmatic world generation, and present SceneCode, a framework that compiles a natural language prompt into an executable, code-driven indoor world rather than a collection of opaque meshes. A room-level agentic backbone first turns the prompt into a structured house layout and emits per-object AssetRequests through a planner--designer--critic loop. Each request is then routed to one of five code-generation strategies and converted into a synthesized part-wise Blender Python programs that are validated through an execution-guided repair-and-refine loop. The resulting programs are compiled into simulation-ready assets, and exported as SDF for physics simulation. A persistent scene-state registry links object requests, executable programs, rendered geometry, and simulation assets, turning scene assembly into a traceable and locally editable world-building process. We evaluate SceneCode across scene-level synthesis, object-level asset quality, human judgment, and downstream robot interaction. Results show that executable world programs improve prompt-faithful indoor scene generation and produce assets with cleaner mesh structure, and simulator-loadable articulation metadata. Project page: https://scene-code.github.io/.
title_zh: SceneCode: 面向含铰接物体的可编辑室内场景的可执行世界程序
abstract_zh: 室内场景合成是具身AI、机器人操作及基于仿真的策略评估的基础，一个有用的场景不仅需要指定环境的外观，还需明确其物体的结构方式。然而，现有流程通常将生成内容表示为静态网格，并仅从精选资产库继承关节结构，这限制了物体级别的可操控性，也无法按需生成新的可交互资产。为解决这一差距，我们将物理可交互的室内场景合成形式化为程序化世界生成，并提出SceneCode框架——该框架将自然语言提示编译为可执行的、代码驱动的室内世界，而非一组不透明的网格。首先，一个房间级智能体主框架将提示转化为结构化的房屋布局，并通过“规划器-设计器-评审器”循环为每个物体生成资产请求。随后，每个请求被路由至五种代码生成策略之一，转化为合成的部件级Blender Python程序，并通过执行引导的修复与优化循环进行验证。最终程序被编译为可模拟的资产，并导出为用于物理模拟的SDF。一个持久化的场景状态注册表将物体请求、可执行程序、渲染几何及模拟资产关联起来，使场景组装成为可追踪且可局部编辑的世界构建过程。我们通过场景级合成、物体级资产质量、人类判断及下游机器人交互对SceneCode进行评估。结果表明，可执行世界程序提升了符合提示的室内场景生成，并产出具有更干净网格结构及可加载至模拟器的关节元数据的资产。项目页面：https://scene-code.github.io/。

title: PRISM: A Benchmark for Programmatic Spatial-Temporal Reasoning
authors: Qiran Zhang, Yuheng Wang, Runde Yang, Lin Wu, Jingru Fan, Shu Yao, Jie Zhang, Tianle Zhou, Huatao Li, Ruijie Shi, Yihan Li, Chen Qian
abstract: Programmatic video generation through code offers geometric precision and temporal coherence beyond pixel-level diffusion models, yet rigorously evaluating whether language models can produce spatially correct animated outputs remains an open problem. We introduce PRISM, a large-scale benchmark of 10,372 human-calibrated instruction-code pairs (20 times larger than prior programmatic video generation benchmarks), grounded in real-world knowledge visualization scenarios across English and Chinese and spanning 437 subject categories. We further propose a funnel-style evaluation framework with four complementary metrics: Code-Level Reliability for executability, Spatial Reasoning for layout correctness over full animation sequences, and Prompt-Aware Dynamic Visual Complexity (PADVC) and Temporal Density (TD) for diagnosing dynamic expression and temporal activity. Systematic evaluation of seven mainstream LLMs reveals a striking Execution-Spatial Gap: the average drop from execution success rate to spatial pass rate is approximately 41%, showing that runnable code does not necessarily yield spatially coherent visual output. These findings show that programmatic video generation evaluation should go beyond executability. PRISM provides a principled benchmark for advancing spatially coherent code generation.
title_zh: PRISM：程序化时空推理基准
abstract_zh: 通过代码进行程序化视频生成能够提供超越像素级扩散模型的几何精度和时间连贯性，但严格评估语言模型能否生成空间正确的动画输出仍然是一个开放性问题。我们提出了PRISM，这是一个包含10,372个人工校准指令-代码对的大规模基准（比此前程序化视频生成基准大20倍），基于真实世界的知识可视化场景，涵盖英语和中文，并横跨437个主题类别。我们进一步提出了一个漏斗式评估框架，包含四个互补指标：用于可执行性的代码级可靠性、用于完整动画序列布局正确性的空间推理、以及用于诊断动态表达和时间活动的提示感知动态视觉复杂度（PADVC）和时间密度（TD）。对七个主流大语言模型的系统评估揭示了一个显著的“执行-空间差距”：从执行成功率到空间通过率的平均下降约为41%，表明可运行的代码并不一定能产生空间连贯的视觉输出。这些发现表明，程序化视频生成的评估应超越可执行性。PRISM为推进空间连贯的代码生成提供了原则性基准。

title: When to Answer and When to Defer: A Decision Framework for Reliable Code Predictions
authors: Ravishka Rathnasuriya, Wei Yang
abstract: Code language models are increasingly adopted for both understanding and generative tasks. Despite their success, these models frequently produce overconfident incorrect predictions and underconfident correct predictions, undermining their reliability in deployment. Practical deployment demands three capabilities: accurately estimating the likelihood of correctness, abstaining on uncertain predictions, and invoking external mechanisms to validate or repair abstained outputs. Existing calibration and uncertainty estimation methods, primarily developed for natural language tasks, do not readily transfer to code. Notably, post-hoc calibration techniques often reduce probability misalignment but fail to improve the ranking of predictions by correctness likelihood-a requirement for selective prediction under partial coverage. Furthermore, most approaches treat uncertainty as a passive indicator rather than an actionable signal. This work introduces a unified framework that integrates uncertainty estimation, model calibration, and tool-based abstention handling for code models. The proposed design enables models to assign reliable correctness probabilities, abstain under uncertainty, and invoke lightweight program analysis procedures to process abstained cases. By combining these components within a single deployment-oriented workflow, this framework supports risk-aware, coverage-controlled use of code models across both classification and generation settings.
title_zh: 何时回答，何时推迟：可靠代码预测的决策框架
abstract_zh: 代码语言模型越来越多地被用于理解和生成任务。尽管取得了成功，这些模型频繁产生过度自信的错误预测和信心不足的正确预测，削弱了其在部署中的可靠性。实际部署需要三种能力：准确估计正确可能性、对不确定预测进行弃权、调用外部机制验证或修复弃权输出。现有的校准和不确定性估计方法主要针对自然语言任务开发，难以直接迁移到代码领域。特别地，事后校准技术通常能减少概率错位，但未能改善按正确可能性对预测进行排序的能力——这是部分覆盖下选择性预测的要求。此外，大多数方法将不确定性视为被动指标而非可操作信号。本文提出一个统一框架，将不确定性估计、模型校准和基于工具的弃权处理整合于代码模型中。该设计使模型能够分配可靠的正确概率、在不确定时弃权，并调用轻量级程序分析过程处理弃权案例。通过将这些组件整合在面向部署的工作流中，该框架支持代码模型在分类和生成场景下的风险感知、覆盖率可控使用。

title: Does Code Cleanliness Affect Coding Agents? A Controlled Minimal-Pair Study
authors: Priyansh Trivedi, Olivier Schmitt
abstract: As autonomous coding agents see rapid adoption, their evaluation has primarily focused on task completion rates holding the target codebase fixed. This leaves a critical question unanswered: does the structural and stylistic quality, or ``cleanliness'' of the underlying code affect an agent's ability to navigate and modify it? To isolate the effect of code cleanliness from agent capability, we introduce an evaluation protocol built around minimal pairs: repositories that match on architecture, dependencies, and external behaviour, but differ on static-analysis rule violations and cognitive complexity. The pairs are constructed in both directions, by agent pipelines that either degrade a clean repository or clean a messy one. We author 33 tasks across six such pairs, evaluated through hidden tests at the application's public surface. Across 660 trials with Claude Code, code cleanliness does not change the agent's pass rate. However, it substantially alters the agent's operational footprint: agents working on cleaner code use 7 to 8% fewer tokens and reduce file revisitations by 34%. Our findings suggest that traditional maintainability principles remain highly relevant in the era of AI-driven development, shaping the computational cost and navigational efficiency of coding agents. Code cleanliness joins model choice, harness, and prompting as a factor that materially affects agent behaviours.
title_zh: 代码整洁度是否影响编码智能体？一项受控最小配对研究
abstract_zh: 随着自主编码代理的快速普及，其评估主要聚焦于在目标代码库固定不变的情况下的任务完成率。这引出了一个关键问题：底层代码的结构与风格质量（即"代码整洁性"）是否会影响代理导航和修改代码的能力？为了将代码整洁性的影响与代理能力剥离开来，我们引入了一种基于最小对的评估协议：即代码库在架构、依赖项和外部行为上保持一致，但在静态分析规则违规次数和认知复杂度上有所差异。这些最小对通过代理流水线以两种方向构建：要么降低整洁代码库的质量，要么清理混乱的代码库。我们在六组这样的最小对上设计了33项任务，并通过应用程序公共接口的隐藏测试进行评估。在660次使用Claude Code的试验中，代码整洁性并未改变代理的通过率。然而，它显著改变了代理的操作开销：处理更整洁代码的代理平均少用7%至8%的令牌，并且文件重访次数减少了34%。我们的研究结果表明，在人工智能驱动的开发时代，传统的可维护性原则仍然高度相关，它们塑造了编码代理的计算成本和导航效率。代码整洁性已与模型选择、工程框架和提示工程共同成为影响代理行为的重要因素。

title: What Do Evolutionary Coding Agents Evolve?
authors: Nico Pelleriti, Sree Harsha Nelaturu, Zhanke Zhou, Zongze Li, Max Zimmer, Bo Han, Sebastian Pokutta
abstract: Recent work pairs LLMs with evolutionary search to iteratively generate, modify, and select code using task-specific feedback. These systems have produced strong results in mathematical discovery and algorithm design, yet a fundamental question remains: what do they actually evolve? Progress is typically summarized by the best score a run reaches under a task-specific evaluator, but that score can reflect several different mechanisms: new algorithmic structure, re-tuning an existing strategy, recombining ideas already in the model's internal knowledge, or overfitting to the evaluator. Distinguishing these mechanisms requires inspecting the search process itself, not only its final outcome. We introduce EvoTrace, a dataset of evolutionary coding traces spanning four evolutionary frameworks, reasoning and non-reasoning models, and 16 tasks across mathematics and algorithm design. To analyze these traces, we develop EvoReplay, a replay-based methodology that reconstructs the local search states behind high-scoring solutions and tests controlled interventions, including adjusting constants, removing program components and substituting models or prompting contexts. We annotate every code edit in EvoTrace with one of nine recurring edit types using an LLM-as-judge pipeline validated against blind human re-annotation. Across EvoTrace, most score gains come from a small subset of these edit types. We further find a deterministic cycling pattern: about 30% of code lines added during search are byte-identical re-introductions of previously-deleted lines, present throughout nearly every run. These results show that benchmark gains in evolutionary coding agents can arise from qualitatively different mechanisms, only some of which correspond to new algorithmic structure. EvoTrace enables more diagnostic evaluation of evolutionary coding agents beyond final benchmark scores.
title_zh: 进化编码代理进化了什么？
abstract_zh: 近期研究将大语言模型与进化搜索相结合，通过任务特定反馈迭代生成、修改和选择代码。这类系统在数学发现和算法设计方面取得了显著成果，但一个根本问题依然存在：它们实际上进化了什么？进展通常通过任务特定评估器下运行所达到的最佳分数来总结，但该分数可能反映多种不同机制：新的算法结构、重新调整现有策略、重组模型内部知识中已有的想法，或过拟合评估器。区分这些机制需要检查搜索过程本身，而不仅仅是最终结果。我们引入了EvoTrace数据集，包含跨四种进化框架、推理与非推理模型、以及数学和算法设计领域16项任务的进化编码轨迹。为分析这些轨迹，我们开发了基于回放的方法EvoReplay，该方法重构高分解决方案背后的局部搜索状态，并测试受控干预，包括调整常数、移除程序组件以及替换模型或提示上下文。我们使用经过盲人重新标注验证的LLM作为评判流水线，将EvoTrace中的每一次代码编辑标注为九种重复编辑类型之一。在EvoTrace中，大多数得分提升来自这些编辑类型中的一小部分。我们还发现一种确定性循环模式：搜索过程中添加的约30%的代码行是先前删除行的字节一致重新引入，几乎出现在每一次运行中。这些结果表明，进化编码智能体在基准测试中的提升可能源于性质不同的机制，其中只有部分对应新的算法结构。EvoTrace使得对进化编码智能体的诊断性评估超越了最终基准分数。

title: Graph Contrastive Learning for Function-Level Code Vulnerability Detection
authors: Kunfeng Du
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Advanced Electronic Technology, Computers and Software Engineering (AETCSE)
abstract: Source code vulnerability detection is critical for software security. While Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) capture code semantics, existing methods often fail to represent deep semantic and complex structural dependencies. We propose GCL-FVD, a novel function-level detection model based on Graph Contrastive Learning. GCL-FVD first constructs an extended Abstract Syntax Trees to capture program logic. It then employs a multi-branch contrastive framework with graph augmentation and a momentum update mechanism to learn robust representations across views. Finally, a joint optimization loss enhances feature discriminability. Experimental results on public datasets demonstrate that GCL-FVD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in detecting complex vulnerabilities.
title_zh: 基于图对比学习的函数级代码漏洞检测
abstract_zh: 源代码漏洞检测对软件安全至关重要。尽管图神经网络（GNNs）能够捕获代码语义，但现有方法往往难以表征深层语义和复杂的结构依赖关系。我们提出了一种基于图对比学习的新型函数级检测模型GCL-FVD。该模型首先构建扩展的抽象语法树以捕捉程序逻辑；随后采用多分支对比框架，结合图增强与动量更新机制，学习跨视图的鲁棒表征；最后通过联合优化损失增强特征的可判别性。在公开数据集上的实验结果表明，GCL-FVD在检测复杂漏洞方面显著优于当前最先进方法。

title: DrlGoFPGA 2.0: FPGA Global Placement Based on Multi-Agent Graph Transformers and Nonlinear Placement Co-Optimization
authors: Kang Yang, Jianwang Zhai, Liuyu Xiang, Kang Zhao, Wei Li, Ming Lei, Zhaofeng He
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: The speed and quality of global placement (GP) are crucial for FPGA performance. The existing nonlinear placers provide higher computational efficiency than heuristic algorithms, but their insufficient attention to the initialization of GP distributions limits rapid convergence towards high-quality global optimal solutions. To resolve this, we propose a GP framework, DrlGoFPGA 2.0, combining LUT, FF, DSP, and RAM (LFDR) instance placement generation based on multi-agent graph transformer network (MAGTN) and LFDR initial placement fine-tuning based on nonlinear placement. A MAGTN model for LFDR initial placement is designed, which utilizes distributed training to circumvent the issues of sub-optimal placement models and prolonged training times due to the non-uniform distribution of large-scale LFDR sites. A lightweight LFDR line-network relationships (LNR) graph supporting MAGTN co-decision is created by separating, renumbering, and deduplicating the LNR graph containing all instances, and inputting the LFDR LNR graph into MAGTN to obtain the connections between LFDRs. The experimental results on ISPD’2016/2017 benchmarks show that compared with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) nonlinear placer, DrlGoFPGA 2.0 can improve GP speed by 27.3% ∼ 82.1%, reduce half-perimeter wirelength by 0.6% ∼ 4.6%, and routed wirelength by 0.4% ∼ 2.8%.
title_zh: DrlGoFPGA 2.0：基于多智能体图变换器与非线性布局协同优化的FPGA全局布局
abstract_zh: 全局布局（GP）的速度与质量对FPGA性能至关重要。现有非线性布局器相比启发式算法具有更高的计算效率，但它们对GP分布初始化阶段的关注不足，限制了向高质量全局最优解的快速收敛。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种GP框架DrlGoFPGA 2.0，该框架结合了基于多智能体图变换网络（MAGTN）的LUT、FF、DSP和RAM（LFDR）实例布局生成，以及基于非线性布局的LFDR初始布局微调。我们设计了一种用于LFDR初始布局的MAGTN模型，该模型利用分布式训练规避了因大规模LFDR站点非均匀分布导致的次优布局模型与训练时间过长的问题。通过分离、重编号及去重包含所有实例的LNR（线网关系）图，并构建支持MAGTN协同决策的轻量级LFDR线网关系图（LNR），再将LFDR LNR图输入MAGTN以获取LFDR间的连接关系。在ISPD’2016/2017基准测试上的实验结果表明，与最先进的（SOTA）非线性布局器相比，DrlGoFPGA 2.0可将GP速度提升27.3%至82.1%，半周长线长减少0.6%至4.6%，布线线长减少0.4%至2.8%。

title: Real-Time Diagnosis and Intervention of Teaching Behaviors Driven by Machine Learning in New-Engineering Classrooms
authors: Wei Guo, Zeyu Yan
publish: 2026 15th International Conference on Educational and Information Technology (ICEIT)
abstract: China’s New Engineering programming courses lose one fifth of first year students because instructors cannot spot the seven-minute silent confusion cycle that unfolds while they face the IDE. We trained an edge compute system on thirty thousand labelled frames extracted from one hundred twenty hours of video recorded in ten courses with two hundred eighty four students. A pruned YOLOv8 Transformer ensemble running on a four gigabyte Jetson Nano detects eight micro behaviors such as keyboard silence head pose drift and IDE error bursts at twenty five frames per second within forty milliseconds. When the posterior probability of confusion or distraction exceeds nought point seven for three consecutive frames the board flashes a three level cue on the instructor s secondary monitor and pushes a four line AST matched code hint into each student s IDE. An A B A experiment with one hundred eight novices showed immediate gains. Eye movement entropy fell from three point nine zero to three point one eight bits and quiz accuracy rose from seventy two point seven per cent to eighty four point six per cent. Four weeks after withdrawal retention remained seven point three percentage points above baseline. The bill of materials is two hundred seventeen euros per classroom. The dataset and Jetson image are released under MIT License for three hundred room scale up.
title_zh: 机器学习驱动的新工科课堂教学行为实时诊断与干预
abstract_zh: 中国新工科编程课程中，五分之一的大一新生因教师无法识别他们在面对集成开发环境时长达七分钟的沉默困惑周期而流失。我们从十门课程、两百八十四名学生、一百二十小时的视频中提取了三万个标注帧，训练了一个边缘计算系统。一个经过剪枝的YOLOv8 Transformer集成模型在四GB容量的Jetson Nano上运行，能以每秒二十五帧的速度、在四十毫秒内检测出八种微行为，如键盘静默、头部姿态偏移和集成开发环境错误爆发。当困惑或分心的后验概率在连续三帧中超过零点七时，看板会在教师辅助显示器上闪烁三级提示，并向每位学生的集成开发环境推送一行包含四行抽象语法树匹配的代码提示。针对一百零八名初学者开展的前后对照实验显示即时成效：眼动熵从三点九零比特降至三点一八比特，测验准确率从百分之七十二点七升至百分之八十四点六。撤除干预四周后，保留效果仍比基线高七点三个百分点。每间教室的材料成本为两百一十七欧元。数据集和Jetson镜像以MIT许可证发布，支持三百间教室的规模扩展。

title: Algorithmic Exploration of Matching Network Topologies for Power Amplifiers
authors: Sergio López de Pablo, Joel Mesas, Pedro de Paco, Jordi Verdú
publish: IEEE Transactions on Microwave Theory and Techniques
abstract: In this article, a novel exploration algorithm for the design and optimization of matching networks (MNs) in power amplifiers (PAs) is presented. The methodology is based on the automatic generation and optimization of both input and output MNs (IMNs/OMNs) according to a set of design rules and constraints that ensure technological feasibility. All candidate MN topologies are optimized and ranked using a unified cost function, enabling the automatic selection of the most suitable solution while facilitating a comprehensive tradeoff analysis among key performance metrics such as power-added efficiency (PAE), gain, bandwidth, physical size, and expected yield. As a result, the designer obtains a global view of the solution space and can objectively compare different MN configurations within a consistent optimization framework. To validate the proposed algorithm, a PA covering 1.1–1.9 GHz—fully encompassing the Galileo navigation bands E5, E6, and L1—and targeting high efficiency with harmonic control, was designed, fabricated, and experimentally characterized.
title_zh: 功率放大器匹配网络拓扑的算法探索
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的探索算法，用于功率放大器（PA）中匹配网络（MN）的设计与优化。该方法基于一组确保工艺可行性的设计规则与约束，自动生成并优化输入与输出匹配网络（IMN/OMN）。所有候选的匹配网络拓扑结构均通过统一的代价函数进行优化与排序，从而自动选取最合适的解决方案，同时便于在功率附加效率（PAE）、增益、带宽、物理尺寸及预期良率等关键性能指标间进行全面的权衡分析。由此，设计者可获得解决方案空间的全局视图，并在一致的优化框架内客观比较不同匹配网络配置。为验证所提算法，设计、制造并实验表征了一款覆盖1.1–1.9 GHz（完全涵盖伽利略导航频段E5、E6和L1）且具备谐波控制能力的高效率功率放大器。

title: SE-Blackboard: A Shared-State Architecture for Multi-Agent Software Engineering Pipelines
authors: Erxi Liu, Qiang Zhu, Xinru Dong
abstract: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems are increasingly used for software engineering tasks, yet the role of communication architecture in these systems remains poorly understood. Most existing approaches rely on message passing, where agents communicate through sequential natural language summaries, potentially introducing information loss across pipeline stages. This paper introduces SE-Blackboard, a modular framework that applies a shared-state Blackboard architecture to multi-agent software engineering pipelines.We conduct controlled experiments on 50 SWE-bench Lite issues, comparing three communication architectures: message passing, shared-state blackboard, and a hybrid design. Our results show that communication architecture significantly affects information preservation and intermediate pipeline performance. The blackboard configuration improves Coder-stage information fidelity (IFS) by 62% compared with message passing (0.586 vs. 0.362), which translates into a 27.5 percentage-point improvement in correct file targeting (82.6% vs. 55.1%). However, once the correct file is identified, all configurations converge to a ∼22% conditional resolve rate, revealing a downstream bottleneck in LLM diff generation. As a result, the overall resolve-rate improvement is modest (16% vs. 12%) despite large upstream gains. These findings highlight communication architecture as an important design dimension for multi-agent software engineering systems and suggest that improvements in upstream information quality translate into task-level gains only when downstream generation bottlenecks are addressed.
title_zh: SE-Blackboard：一种面向多智能体软件工程流水线的共享状态架构
abstract_zh: 多智能体大语言模型系统越来越多地被用于软件工程任务，但其通信架构的作用仍未被充分理解。现有方法大多依赖消息传递，即智能体通过顺序的自然语言摘要进行通信，这可能导致信息在流水线各阶段间丢失。本文提出SE-Blackboard，一种模块化框架，将共享状态黑板架构应用于多智能体软件工程流水线。我们在SWE-bench Lite的50个问题上进行了对照实验，比较了三种通信架构：消息传递、共享状态黑板以及混合设计。结果表明，通信架构显著影响信息保留和中间流水线性能。与消息传递相比，黑板架构将编码器阶段的信息保真度提高了62%（0.586对比0.362），这使正确文件定位的准确率提升了27.5个百分点（82.6%对比55.1%）。然而，一旦找到正确的文件，所有架构的条件解析率都收敛于约22%，揭示出大语言模型差异生成环节存在下游瓶颈。因此，尽管上游收益显著，总体解析率的提升却较为有限（16%对比12%）。这些发现表明，通信架构是多智能体软件工程系统的重要设计维度，并且只有在解决下游生成瓶颈时，上游信息质量的改进才能转化为任务层面的收益。

title: DC Modeling of 8 kV Depletion Mode Gallium Oxide MOSFET
authors: Abu Shahir Md Khalid Hasan, Mohammad Dehan Rahman, Md Majharul Islam, Md Maksudul Hossain, H. Alan Mantooth
publish: 2026 IEEE Applied Power Electronics Conference and Exposition (APEC)
abstract: Gallium oxide (Ga<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>O<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">3</inf>) has recently gained significant attention for high-voltage power electronics owing to its ultra-wide bandgap, high critical electric field (~8 MV/cm), and the potential for cost-effective single-crystal wafer production. Among its polymorphs, β-Ga<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>O<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">3</inf> is the most stable and has enabled the demonstration of depletion-mode lateral MOSFETs with breakdown voltages up to 8 kV. Building on our recent work on a 750 V β-Ga<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>O<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">3</inf> MOSFET, this paper extends a physics-based compact modeling approach to higher-voltage devices. The model formulation combines channel current with drift resistance, where drift mobility is extracted from Hall mobility accounting for four dominant scattering mechanisms and their temperature dependence. Simulation results show good agreement with measured transfer and output characteristics, validating the model’s scalability across voltages. This compact model provides a physics-informed framework for incorporating Ga<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</inf>O<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">3</inf> devices into power electronic circuit simulation and design.
title_zh: 8千伏耗尽型氧化镓MOSFET的直流建模
abstract_zh: 氧化镓（Ga₂O₃）因其超宽禁带、高临界电场（约8 MV/cm）以及低成本单晶衬底的生产潜力，近年来在高压电力电子领域受到广泛关注。在其多种晶相中，β-Ga₂O₃最为稳定，并已实现击穿电压高达8 kV的耗尽型横向MOSFET。基于我们近期关于750 V β-Ga₂O₃ MOSFET的研究，本文将基于物理的紧凑建模方法拓展至更高电压器件。该模型将沟道电流与漂移区电阻相结合，其中漂移迁移率通过霍尔迁移率提取，考虑了四种主要散射机制及其温度依赖性。仿真结果与实测转移特性和输出特性吻合良好，验证了模型在电压范围内的可扩展性。该紧凑模型为将Ga₂O₃器件纳入电力电子电路仿真与设计提供了基于物理的理论框架。

title: Scalable Energy-Aware Task Scheduling on Heterogeneous Voltage Frequency Islands: From Optimal ILP to Practical Heuristics with Real-World Validation
authors: Sanchit, Sakshi, Maanas Singal, Dheeraj Kumar Dhaked, V.L. Narayanan, Jagpreet Singh
abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive approach to energy-efficient DAG scheduling on Voltage Frequency Islands (VFI) architectures, combining optimal Integer Linear Programming (ILP) formulation with a novel Energy-Aware List Scheduling with Dynamic Slot Reuse (EALS-DSR) heuristic. The work addresses the critical challenge of minimizing makespan and overall energy consumption through intelligent task allocation, voltage/frequency assignments, and scheduling optimization. Our contributions include: (1) a detailed ILP formulation with theoretical guarantees for optimal solutions, (2) the EALS-DSR heuristic providing near-optimal solutions with polynomial complexity O(n²p), (3) comprehensive experimental validation on LUD, FFT, and Random DAGs, and (4) real-world molecular dynamics simulation case study. To minimize makespan and overall energy consumption, a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) can be scheduled on voltage frequency islands by first splitting the available processing units into numerous islands with different voltage and frequency levels. This paper presents a comprehensive approach combining Integer Linear Programming (ILP) with a novel Energy-Aware List Scheduling with Dynamic Slot Reuse (EALS-DSR) heuristic. The proposed methodology includes four main components: (a) DAG modeling, (b) job allocation based on slots, (c) voltage/frequency assignments to each slot, and (d) scheduling optimization. We extend the original ILP formulation with theoretical analysis, comprehensive experimental validation, and real-world case studies including molecular dynamics simulation. Results demonstrate that the ILP approach improves performance by 10-24% over existing methods, while EALS-DSR achieves 15-25% energy savings with excellent scalability for large-scale problems. The molecular dynamics case study shows 37.4% energy reduction and 3.86× efficiency improvement, validating practical applicability.
title_zh: 异构电压频率岛上的可扩展能量感知任务调度：从最优整数线性规划到实用启发式算法及真实世界验证
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在电压频率岛（VFI）架构上实现能效型有向无环图（DAG）调度的综合方法，融合了最优整数线性规划（ILP）公式与一种新颖的能效型动态时隙重用列表调度（EALS-DSR）启发式算法。该工作通过智能任务分配、电压/频率分配及调度优化，解决了最小化完工时间和整体能耗的关键挑战。我们的贡献包括：(1) 提供具有理论最优解保证的详细ILP公式，(2) 复杂度为O(n²p)的多项式级EALS-DSR启发式算法，可提供近优解，(3) 在LUD、FFT和随机DAG上的全面实验验证，以及(4) 基于真实分子动力学模拟的案例研究。为最小化完工时间和整体能耗，可通过将可用处理单元拆分为多个不同电压/频率级别的岛，在电压频率岛上调度DAG。本文提出了一种综合方法，将整数线性规划与新颖的能效型动态时隙重用列表调度启发式算法相结合。所提方法包含四个主要部分：(a) DAG建模，(b) 基于时隙的任务分配，(c) 每个时隙的电压/频率分配，以及(d) 调度优化。我们在原有ILP公式基础上进行了理论分析、全面实验验证及包含分子动力学模拟的真实案例研究。结果表明，ILP方法相比现有方法性能提升10-24%，而EALS-DSR在大型问题中实现15-25%的能耗节省且扩展性优异。分子动力学案例研究显示能耗降低37.4%，效率提升3.86倍，验证了实际应用可行性。

title: IEEE Bulgaria Section Jt. Chapter CAS04/SSC37 Hosts CASS Distinguished Lecturer Prof. Ricardo Reis [CASS Chapter Highlights]
authors: Valeri Mladenov
abstract: As part of the IEEE Circuits and Systems Society Distinguished Lecturer (DL) Program, Prof. Ricardo Reis visited Bulgaria in November 2025 and delivered two invited lectures hosted by the Bulgarian CASS Chapter and Bulgarian universities. Invited by Prof. Valeri Mladenov, Chair of the IEEE Bulgaria Section Joint Chapter CAS04/SSC37, the lectures addressed both emerging trends and advanced methodologies in microelectronics and physical design automation. The events attracted strong interest from the academic community and contributed to strengthening collaboration between the IEEE Circuits and Systems community and academic institutions in Bulgaria.
title_zh: IEEE保加利亚分会联合分会CAS04/SSC37主办CASS杰出讲师Ricardo Reis教授 [CASS分会亮点]
abstract_zh: 作为IEEE电路与系统学会杰出讲师（DL）计划的一部分，Ricardo Reis教授于2025年11月访问保加利亚，并在保加利亚CASS分会及多所大学的主持下发表了两次受邀讲座。应IEEE保加利亚分会联合分会CAS04/SSC37主席Valeri Mladenov教授的邀请，讲座探讨了微电子与物理设计自动化的新兴趋势及先进方法论。活动引发了学术界的浓厚兴趣，并促进了IEEE电路与系统社区与保加利亚学术机构之间的合作。

title: From Large Language Models to Reasoning and Agents
authors: Miroslaw Staron, Silvia Abrahão
abstract: Software engineering is shifting from standalone large language models to reasoning-driven and agent-based systems. Drawing on ASE 2025 research, this column highlights how AI agents now test, debug, adapt, and explain software, making a transition toward more autonomous and observable AI-assisted development.
title_zh: 从大型语言模型到推理与智能体
abstract_zh: 软件工程正从独立的大型语言模型转向推理驱动和基于代理的系统。借鉴ASE 2025的研究成果，本专栏着重展示AI代理如何测试、调试、适应和解释软件，推动着向更自主、更可观察的AI辅助开发模式转型。

title: Bytecode-Level Ensemble Framework for V8 Vulnerability Detection in Regression Tests
authors: Deepa Thilak K, Muhammed Sahal M N, Abdur Rahman
publish: 2026 3rd International Conference on Research Methodologies in Knowledge Management, Artificial Intelligence and Telecommunication Engineering (RMKMATE)
abstract: JavaScript engine vulnerabilities pose critical security risks to billions of web users, yet automated detection in regression test suites remains challenging due to high false-positive rates and limited semantic understanding of execution behavior. This paper presents a bytecode-level machine learning framework for vulnerability detection in V8 engine regression tests, extracting 41 interpretable features from Ignition bytecode including instruction diversity metrics, constant pool characteristics, and proximity-based semantic patterns. A soft-voting ensemble combining Random Forest and Gradient Boosting achieves 78.8% accuracy in balanced mode and–critically–94.1% precision at <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1. 4 3 \%}$</tex> FPR in low-noise triage mode, the operating point most relevant for CI deployment. The ensemble outperforms LSTM-based deep learning by 10.2 percentage points, while SHAP analysis confirms instruction diversity as the primary discriminative feature. The framework supports threshold-based deployment enabling automated prioritization of regression tests requiring manual security review.
title_zh: 用于回归测试中V8漏洞检测的字节码级别集成框架
abstract_zh: JavaScript引擎漏洞对数十亿网络用户构成严重安全风险，然而由于高误报率以及对执行行为的语义理解有限，在回归测试套件中自动化检测这些漏洞仍然充满挑战。本文提出一种基于字节码的机器学习框架，用于检测V8引擎回归测试中的漏洞——从Ignition字节码中提取41个可解释特征，包括指令多样性指标、常量池特性以及基于邻近度的语义模式。结合随机森林和梯度提升的软投票集成方法，在均衡模式下达到78.8%的准确率，而在低噪声分类模式下（最适用于持续集成部署的操作点）实现了94.1%的精确率，同时误报率仅为1.43%。该集成方法比基于LSTM的深度学习性能高出10.2个百分点，而SHAP分析证实指令多样性是最具区分性的特征。该框架支持基于阈值的部署，能够实现需要人工安全审查的回归测试的自动化优先级排序。

title: Source Code Vulnerability Detection and Personalized Password Recovery Tool
authors: T Shyam Ganesh, T Vignesh, R Vasanthi
publish: 2026 International Conference on Smart Multidomain Integrated Learning Environments (ICSMILE)
abstract: The paper presents an intelligent machine learning-based security tool, which is used to process uploaded source code and detect possible vulnerabilities with the help of a feedforward neural network model. The system uses the method of token extraction, feature selection, model training and classification as the techniques of the system that are used to efficiently identify risky blocks of code. The application is trained on labelled datasets using a simple user interface and it helps developers and organisations to improve the security of their software by detecting flaws in real-time. Also, a password-recovery module is incorporated that provides possible passwords according to the keywords that were used in the past and typed in by the user. This project enhances cybersecurity, minimizes manual auditing, and allows identifying and addressing security vulnerabilities in time due to automatic password suggestions and vulnerability detection.
title_zh: 源代码漏洞检测和个性化密码恢复工具
abstract_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于智能机器学习的网络安全工具，用于处理上传的源代码，并借助前馈神经网络模型检测潜在漏洞。该系统采用令牌提取、特征选择、模型训练和分类等方法作为核心技术，以高效识别高风险代码片段。该应用通过简单的用户界面在标注数据集上进行训练，帮助开发者和组织实时检测缺陷，从而提升软件安全性。此外，系统集成了密码恢复模块，可根据用户过去使用和输入的关键词生成可能的密码。该项目增强了网络安全，减少了人工审计的工作量，并通过自动密码建议和漏洞检测，能够及时识别和解决安全漏洞。

title: Multi-Label Eye Disease Diagnosis from Paired Fundus Images Using EfficientNet-ML-Decoder and SAM with Grad-CAM Explanations
authors: Nabeel Ahmed Awan, Adeel Ahmed Awan
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Emerging Technologies and Engineering Systems (ICETES)
abstract: Multi-label eye disease diagnosis from retinal fundus images is central to scalable screening, yet it remains challenging due to co-morbidity, class imbalance, and distribution shift across acquisition settings. This paper presents an explainable and reliability-aware screening pipeline based on a strong pub-lic baseline that combines EfficientNet feature extraction with an ML-Decoder multi-label head. Using the ODIR-5K paired-fundus benchmark, we summarize a reproducible evaluation across threefold cross-validation and off-site/on-site testing. The best configuration (EfficientNet-B5 + MLDecoder + Sharpness-Aware Minimization) achieves <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{6 8. 9 6 \%}$</tex> Cohen's kappa, 92.48% macro-F1, and 94.80% macro-AUC on threefold cross-validation, and maintains strong discrimination under domain shift with <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{9 5. 0 2 \%} \boldsymbol{/} \mathbf{9 3. 8 4 \%}$</tex> macro-AUC on off-site/on-site testing, respectively. Class-wise analysis shows high accuracy for DR, AMD, hypertension, cataract, and myopia, while “Normal” and “Other abnormalities” remain comparatively difficult, indicating the impact of intra-class variability and label ambiguity. To support transparency, we include Grad-CAM explanations for qualitative verification and error analysis. The results demonstrate that an EfficientNet + ML-Decoder foundation, strengthened with SAM, provides a competitive and practical baseline for multi-disease fundus screening suitable for engineering-oriented deployment studies.
title_zh: 基于配对眼底图像的多标签眼病诊断：使用EfficientNet-ML-Decoder、SAM与Grad-CAM解释
abstract_zh: 基于视网膜眼底图像的多标签眼病诊断是规模化筛查的核心，但由于共病性、类别不平衡以及不同采集环境下的分布偏移等问题，仍具有挑战性。本文提出了一种基于强大公共基线的可解释且具备可靠性感知的筛查流程，该基线将EfficientNet特征提取与ML-Decoder多标签头相结合。利用ODIR-5K配对眼底基准数据集，我们总结了在三折交叉验证及离场/在场测试中的可重复评估结果。最优配置（EfficientNet-B5 + MLDecoder + 锐度感知最小化）在三折交叉验证中实现了68.96%的Cohen's kappa系数、92.48%的宏平均F1分数和94.80%的宏平均AUC，同时在域偏移下保持强劲的区分能力，离场/在场测试的宏平均AUC分别为95.02%和93.84%。类别分析显示，对糖尿病视网膜病变、年龄相关性黄斑变性、高血压、白内障和近视具有较高准确性，而“正常”和“其他异常”类别仍相对困难，这表明了类内变异和标签模糊性的影响。为支持透明性，我们包含Grad-CAM解释用于定性验证和错误分析。结果表明，以EfficientNet + ML-Decoder为基础、通过SAM增强的框架为适合工程导向部署研究的多病种眼底筛查提供了具有竞争力的实用基线。
